'''竏營h-dh-ng''' ('''shazhadhang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:navel|navel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:navel|navel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-dh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| shazhadhang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhadhang|thizhadhang]] || [[word:jizhadhang|jizhadhang]] || [[word:shizhadhang|shizhadhang]] || [[word:kizhadhang|kizhadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhadhang|thuthuzhadhang]] || [[word:jujuzhadhang|jujuzhadhang]] || [[word:shushuzhadhang|shushuzhadhang]] || [[word:kukuzhadhang|kukuzhadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhadhang|thuzhadhang]] || [[word:juzhadhang|juzhadhang]] || [[word:shuzhadhang|shuzhadhang]] || [[word:kuzhadhang|kuzhadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhadhang|thuzhadhang]] || [[word:juzhadhang|juzhadhang]] || [[word:shuzhadhang|shuzhadhang]] || [[word:kuzhadhang|kuzhadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhadhang|thezhadhang]] || [[word:jezhadhang|jezhadhang]] || [[word:shezhadhang|shezhadhang]] || [[word:kezhadhang|kezhadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhadhang|thothozhadhang]] || [[word:jojozhadhang|jojozhadhang]] || [[word:shoshozhadhang|shoshozhadhang]] || [[word:kokozhadhang|kokozhadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhadhang|thozhadhang]] || [[word:jozhadhang|jozhadhang]] || [[word:shozhadhang|shozhadhang]] || [[word:kozhadhang|kozhadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhadhang|thozhadhang]] || [[word:jozhadhang|jozhadhang]] || [[word:shozhadhang|shozhadhang]] || [[word:kozhadhang|kozhadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhadhang|thﾃｦzhadhang]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhadhang|jﾃｦzhadhang]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhadhang|shﾃｦzhadhang]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhadhang|kﾃｦzhadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhadhang|thathazhadhang]] || [[word:jajazhadhang|jajazhadhang]] || [[word:shashazhadhang|shashazhadhang]] || [[word:kakazhadhang|kakazhadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhadhang|thazhadhang]] || [[word:jazhadhang|jazhadhang]] || [[word:shazhadhang|shazhadhang]] || [[word:kazhadhang|kazhadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhadhang|thazhadhang]] || [[word:jazhadhang|jazhadhang]] || [[word:shazhadhang|shazhadhang]] || [[word:kazhadhang|kazhadhang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhadhang|shazhadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhadhang|goshazhadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhadhang|gokishazhadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhangnﾃｼ|shazhadhangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnknﾃｼ|goshazhadhangnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangnﾃｼ|gokishazhadhangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhadhangshﾃｫ|shazhadhangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫ|goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangshﾃｫ|gokishazhadhangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhangro|shazhadhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkro|goshazhadhangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangro|gokishazhadhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhangmu|shazhadhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkmu|goshazhadhangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangmu|gokishazhadhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhadhangsher|shazhadhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnksher|goshazhadhangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangsher|gokishazhadhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhadhang|shazhadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkng|goshazhadhangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhadhang|gokishazhadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhadhangya|shazhadhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkya|goshazhadhangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangya|gokishazhadhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhadhangyam|shazhadhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkyam|goshazhadhangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangyam|gokishazhadhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhadhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhadhangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhadhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhangnﾃｼro|shazhadhangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnknﾃｼro|goshazhadhangnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangnﾃｼro|gokishazhadhangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhangnﾃｼmu|shazhadhangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnknﾃｼmu|goshazhadhangnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangnﾃｼmu|gokishazhadhangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhadhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhadhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhangshﾃｫro|shazhadhangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫro|goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangshﾃｫro|gokishazhadhangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhangshﾃｫmu|shazhadhangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhadhangnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangshﾃｫmu|gokishazhadhangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhangronﾃｼ|shazhadhangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkronﾃｼ|goshazhadhangnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangronﾃｼ|gokishazhadhangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhangroshﾃｫ|shazhadhangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhadhangnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangroshﾃｫ|gokishazhadhangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhangromu|shazhadhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkromu|goshazhadhangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangromu|gokishazhadhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhangmunﾃｼ|shazhadhangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhadhangnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangmunﾃｼ|gokishazhadhangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhangmushﾃｫ|shazhadhangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhadhangnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangmushﾃｫ|gokishazhadhangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhangmuro|shazhadhangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhangnkmuro|goshazhadhangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhangmuro|gokishazhadhangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
